title: Caelum Creo: Recipes for skyblock
description: A datapack for 1.20.1 that allows for create and skyblock to coexist, without depending on other mods.
body:
### Mod version packaged by modrinth doesn't seem to work correctly, will fix soon (hopefully)
## The worlds of skyblock and create in one place
This data-pack aims to be a one-size-fits-all for playing skyblock with create, it allows automation of many blocks/items and adds various alternative recipes. 
It is intended to be balanced while still facilitating the process of obtaining many resources.
### A list of all blocks/items with a new recipe:
- All saplings/crops
- blaze burners
- blaze rods
- calcite
- copper
- diorite
- deepslate
- dripstone
- kelp
- leather
- moss
- mycelium
- podzol
- quartz
- redstone
- sand
- zinc
These new recipes allow for things like andesite to be obtained and thus allow for progression on the create mod.
